title: Red Matches, Red Wins
description: Both ingredients share a Red+ sign. What can you say about the result before you even check sizes?

hints.text: Two-colour rule first: pnP has R+, Ppn has R+. Red signs match → the result must be Red or Green. Blue is impossible.
Now check whether Red resolves: pnP has R+Small, Ppn has R+Large. Signs match AND sizes differ → Red resolves directly.
The result is R+. Red signs matched and Red sizes differed, so Red was the resolver. The two-colour rule correctly predicted Red or Green — and Red won.
